title: Central bank raises interest rates
text: The central bank raised interest rates on Tuesday. Borrowing costs increased shortly afterward. Several firms delayed expansion plans due to higher financing costs.

title: Inflation data pushes policy tighter
text: Inflation remained high this month. Policymakers signaled tighter monetary policy. Bond yields rose later in the day.

title: Rate hike pressures manufacturers
text: A surprise rate hike increased financing pressure. Manufacturers cut hiring plans the following week. Some suppliers reduced orders afterward.

title: Battery recall shocks investors
text: The company announced a recall of defective battery units. Investor confidence weakened after the announcement. Stock prices fell before the market close.

title: CEO resigns after product crisis
text: A product recall expanded across several markets. The CEO resigned the next morning. The company's stock price fell again later that day.
